title: Agentlas Package Contract
description: Machine-readable single source of truth for the artifacts every generated Agentlas package must contain. Prompts (hep-build.md, builder agents, Desktop Build) and gates (hephaestus contract verify) both derive from this file so the contract can never drift between surfaces.

fill.description: static: scaffolder copies the template verbatim (no model). fill: model fills template placeholders only (extraction-shaped; safe for schema-constrained decoding). generate: model writes free-form content first, then structures it — never constrain decoding here (reasoning degrades under premature serialization).

schema.description: schemas/*.schema.json used by verify for top-level required-field checks

lint.description: Deep content lint to run beyond schema shape

description.description: One line injected into builder prompts
